title: Cippay #5598
definition:
Sippai = "threshold"

 1) one of the sons of the Philistine giant slain by Sibbechai the
    Hushathite
nasbUsage:

 1) one of the sons of the Philistine giant slain by Sibbechai the
    Hushathite

    NASB:  a Philistine (the same as 5593)
